name: Grilled Prawn Salad
recipeInstructions:
Note: Use 30 to 40 small prawns or 12 to 18 medium ones. Prawns should be peeled and deveined.
1. Combine 2 tablespoons olive oil, chopped fresh thyme, and minced garlic in a small bowl.
2. Dip the prawns in the oil mixture to coat well.
3. Grill over hot coals just until the prawns are seared.
4. In a saucepan, combine white wine, unsalted butter, sugar, and 12 cloves of garlic. Reduce to a syrupy consistency (the garlic will be candied).
5. Set aside the sauce.
6. In a bowl, combine radicchio, escarole, and mache leaves.
7. Toss the greens with the garlic-syrup mixture (including the candied garlic), feta cheese, and 1 tablespoon olive oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
8. Toss again, then distribute the greens among 6 plates.
9. Arrange the prawns and olives over the greens.
